summary: Wrote chapter 7 Andorhal. 3 scenes (Into the Mouth, The Split, The Full Picture). 7 craft-audit iterations to pass: main issues were em-dash overuse, POV overcertification of other characters inner states, texture deficit in exposition-heavy stretches, and Jaina mechanism dialogue slipping into clinical register. Continuity gate found 2 hard violations (packaging-stage mechanism revealed too early in scene 1; same-night capture committed before prescribed synthesis beat) fixed in 1 continuity-writer pass. Final v1.md at ~9424 words.
